decisions.text: Use Bemis-Murcko scaffold-aware split instead of random split for train/val/test
decisions.rationale: Tanimoto analysis showed 15% near-duplicates that would leak between train and test sets under random split.

questions.text: Which splitting strategy to use for train/val/test?
questions.answer: Bemis-Murcko scaffold-aware split. Random split invalid due to 15% near-duplicate leak risk.

dashboard_status_line: Active — scaffold-aware split decided; implementation next.
